title: Law Is Pushed to the Limit
description: Pages 14–18 focus on law is pushed to the limit, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as bellamy refuses to abandon his pride even after Doflamingo uses him, leaving Luffy trapped between mercy and battle.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oi! Mingo!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Stop Bellamy! He's gonna die!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So you're still wasting air down there, eh, bellamy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eh, why the hell not.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah! Bellamy!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's more than enough, Bellamy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll set you free.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: free as you used to be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Everyone who knows about him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where were you born?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All of us are from notice!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's a plenty affluent town! What need could you possibly have?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We're bored of that damn town!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: The Donquijote Family is the pride of North Blue!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We wanna become a pirate crew like your guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A cut above the lackeys that sit about dreaming of Bluer seas!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll bequeath upon you a symbol. However,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If you lose to any- one, you've gotta give it back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You serious!? Sweet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I do not have time to coddle feeble underlings!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Someone who is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: We won't lose! To anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: OI! Bellamy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You okay!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: You're definitely not okay, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: The age of pirates chasing silly dreams are over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I ain't got any more grudges against you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You've changed, Bellamy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Oi, don't push yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Just stay down!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Joker wants me to kill straw hat?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So you've still got a chance, eh, Bellamy? That's good to know.*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You'll find a way to screw up the assassination anyway,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: And you're just an ugly little fucker, so he told me to finish you off...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: There it is again... These VI- Brations are crazy!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't make me have to spell it out in black and white for you, Bellamy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: From the beginning, yours and my goals have been totally different!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: There's no way I could do that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: He's my friend!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oi, Bellamy! I'm sorry, but can you just wait here?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm worried about Traffy! Mingo and shot-guy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Are both up there! If I don't get up there soon, traffic's gonna be in serious trouble!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll be sure to give Mingo one or two for you, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: you... do you remember this technique?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Spring Hopper, I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: You've become stronger, but so have I!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: The destructive power of this technique ain't nothin' like it used to be!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oi! Bellamy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: If you keep flailing around like that you're gonna die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Screw you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Stop showing compassion for your enemy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I already know! I know the extent of my own misery...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: And the fact that I picked the wrong man to look up to!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: I ain't about to do some- thing as pathetic as...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Just 'cuz I didn't get the answers I wanted to hear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Fools have their...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: own foolish way of doing things!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat! This is my final fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Each 765 / end

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: JOIN ME!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: The resolve of a friend rises to block his path!

summary: Law Is Pushed to the Limit advances the Dressrosa story through Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
